channel.title: changeme on The Sprawl

item.title: Foo Fighters Unleash the Colour and the Shape 23 Years Ago Today
item.content:encoded:
Immer noch in meiner Top10

When Dave Grohl and the Foo Fighters released ‘The Colour and the Shape’ on May 20, 1997, their career – and the state of rock music – was changed. — Weiterlesen www.rockcellarmagazine.com/foo-fighters-the-colour-and-the-shape-retrospective-dave-grohl/
